falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate a confirmed market top, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5000 (key resistance from bottom_2024_aug pattern) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaking above this level would confirm a bullish continuation, disproving the pattern's validity and the current HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CCI (Commodity Channel Index) crosses above +100 and stays above it for 3 consecutive days within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish trend, falsifying the 'UNKNOWN' phase and proving the HOLD signal was incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
